/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -g -shared  -o ../../lib/python/nimcp.so CMakeFiles/nimcp_python.dir/__/bindings/python/nimcp_python.c.o CMakeFiles/nimcp_python.dir/__/bindings/python/nimcp_signal_filter_py.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/bbrelin/nimcp/build/lib: ../../lib/libnimcp.so.2.6.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.12.so -llz4 -ljansson -lcjson -lsodium
